message:
test: add unit tests for messaging, config tool filtering, and build slots

- messaging.rs: 26 tests (thread_id validation, importance, subject truncation, reply prefix)
- config.rs: 20 tests for should_expose_tool() across all filter profiles
  (full, core, minimal, messaging, custom include/exclude modes)
- build_slots.rs: 15 tests (safe_component sanitization, project_archive_root, slot_dir)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
